appendix.title: Cardholder Name Verification response codes
appendix.para: The following table specifies the Cardholder Name Verification response codes returned in DE-113.38 (see ).

row.entry: Full Match: Name matches issuer records perfectly.
Partial Match: First/Last name matches; minor layout or initial variance.
Mismatch: Name does not match issuer files.
Unavailable: Issuer or country network does not support name matching.
System Error: Timeout or processing failure at the network switch.
